channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla gets a China win that comes with a warning
item.description: Tesla’s (TSLA) worldwide EV story is looking a bit vulnerable. The car company that appeared to be dictating the pace of the electric vehicle market has spent the past year trying to regain momentum in some of its key locations. Chinese competitors have been quicker on pricing, Europe has grown ...

item.title: Lucid Jumps 9%, NIO Rallies 7%, Tesla Rises 4% as EV Stocks Get Charged Up
item.description: The U.S.-listed electric vehicle complex is catching a coordinated bid in Wednesday’s midday session. Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) shares are up 9% to around $6.57, NIO (NYSE:NIO) stock has rallied 7% to $6.52, and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares have climbed 4% to roughly $450. The move spans geographie...

item.title: Waymo expands robotaxi coverage more than 20% — larger than Rhode Island
item.description: Waymo announced a major expansion of its autonomous robotaxi service area, growing to over 1,400 square miles across 11 US cities. That’s an estimated 27% increase from its previous coverage and more territory than the entire state of Rhode Island. The expansion starts in Miami, with Austin, Atla...

item.title: Tesla gathers 93,000 FSD miles in a country where FSD isn’t approved – here’s how
item.description: Tesla has gathered 93,000 Full Self-Driving miles in a country where Full Self-Driving is not even approved. Here’s how. Tesla has quietly logged an impressive 93,000 miles (roughly 150,000 km) of autonomous driving at its Giga Berlin factory —using Full Self-Driving (FSD) in a country where the ...

item.title: Do Lumpy Q1 Deployments Undermine Tesla's Energy Momentum?
item.description: Lumpy quarterly deployments weigh on TSLA's energy storage volumes, but management expects full-year growth and long-term momentum to be strong.

item.title: Tesla Quietly Doubles Down On Germany
item.description: Berlin expansion highlights focus on vertical integration strategy

item.title: SpaceX And Google Explore Wild AI Infrastructure Idea
item.description: Orbital data centers may tackle future AI power demands

item.title: Elon Musk reveals how SpaceX is always on board Air Force One
item.description: Air Force One, the official call sign for a U.S. Air Force aircraft carrying the President, now runs on SpaceX Starlink, CEO Elon Musk revealed. Musk confirmed Tuesday that Starlink internet is live and kicking on Air Force One.

item.title: How Musk’s Visit to China Could Unlock Tesla’s Next Big Growth Driver
item.description: President Trump is trying to drum up business for Tesla, and other American companies, in China this week.

item.title: Ford Is Up 7% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Car Stocks Like General Motors and Tesla?
item.description: Shares of Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) are up roughly 7% in Wednesday morning trading, climbing to about $12.82 from a prior close of $11.99. The move is the stock’s sharpest single-day gain in weeks, and it stands out against a generally quiet automotive tape. By comparison, Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) s...

item.title: Tesla: It's All Downhill From Here
SpaceX unveils sweeping Starship V3 upgrades ahead of May 19 launch
item.description: SpaceX has unveiled sweeping upgrades to its Starship v3 rocket ahead of the upcoming May 19 launch. SpaceX has released a detailed list of changes for Starship Version 3 , the next iteration of its fully reusable super-heavy-lift vehicle. Scheduled for its maiden flight as early as May 19 from S...

item.title: Tesla, BYD Pump Money Into Europe; Chinese EVs On Trump-Xi Agenda?
item.description: Tesla and BYD are both planning to expand manufacturing in Europe. Meanwhile, U.S. automakers fear Trump might open the door to Chinese EVs.

item.title: BYD surpasses Tesla as world’s top energy storage deployer
item.description: BYD has overtaken Tesla to become the world’s largest battery energy storage system (BESS) integrator, capturing 13% of the global market in 2025 compared to Tesla’s 10%, according to new data from Benchmark Mineral Intelligence. The shift marks the end of Tesla’s reign as the top energy storage ...

item.title: Tesla CEO Is Heading to China. What Musk Hopes to Accomplish.
item.description: President Trump is trying to drum up business for Tesla, and other American companies, in China this week.

item.title: Comparative Study: Tesla And Industry Competitors In Automobiles Industry
item.description: In today's rapidly evolving and fiercely competitive business landscape, it is crucial for investors and industry analysts to conduct comprehensive company evaluations. In this article, we will undertake an in-depth industry comparison, assessing Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) alongside its primary competit...

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Launches Affordable Financing Plan After Dropping Out Of China's Top EV 10 Makers
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) has dropped out of the top ten EV companies in the Chinese domestic market as the Elon Musk-led EV giant’s retail sales fell in April. Tesla Drops Out Of Top 10 In a report by CnEVPost on Tuesday, citing the China Passenger Car Association (CPCA) data, BYD Co.

item.title: Tesla commits $250m to Berlin gigafactory expansion
item.description: The facility currently produces hundreds of thousands of Model Y vehicles annually alongside millions of battery cells.

item.title: Tesla sells Shanghai-made Model 3 in Canada at C$39,490 after Carney-Beijing deal cuts Chinese EV tariff to 6.1%
item.description: TL;DR Tesla is selling Shanghai-made Model 3 sedans in Canada at C$39,490, nearly half the C$79,990 price of the Fremont-sourced model, after Prime Minister Carney’s January 2026 trade deal with Beijing cut Chinese EV tariffs from 100 per cent to 6.1 per cent under a quota of 49,000 vehicles. Tes...

item.title: FSD SUBSCRIPTION COMES TO UK
item.description: Thought I’d share this, did consider buying it but realistically how long would it take for the uk roads to be fit for purpose. If I could have a discussion of what you guys with a Tesla with EAP would do that would be great. Thanks in advance submitted by /u/Juniorbraat [link] [comments]

item.title: Trump Just Flew to China With Elon Musk, Larry Fink, and Jensen Huang: Is a Trade Deal News About to Send Bitcoin to $90,000?
item.description: Bitcoin price climbed to a 24-hour high of $81,000 as Trump-China trade news pushed BTC toward its most structurally significant resistance in months. The question now is whether the geopolitical narrative has enough legs to carry BTC through $90,000, or whether the move is front-running an outco...

item.title: Here's Why Tesla Stock Is a Buy Before 2031
item.description: Tesla stock just spiked 30% over 30 days.

item.title: Inside Sam Altman's Dramatic Court Testimony: 'Complicated' Elon Musk Feelings, 'Hair-Raising' Tesla Talks And The Microsoft Temptation
item.description: On Tuesday, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman took the stand in an Oakland federal courthouse in the Musk-Altman trial. Over more than three hours of questioning from both sides, Altman reportedly addressed the key allegations at the heart of the case. Elon Musk's lawsuit alleges that Altman and OpenAI Presi...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Valuation In Focus As Q1 Strength Meets AI And Robotaxi Uncertainty
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is back in the spotlight after a mix of upbeat Q1 results, expanding battery projects, and solid international sales, alongside fresh concerns around Full Self-Driving approvals, robotaxi delays, and execution risk. See our latest analysis for Tesla. Recent headlines around Q1 earnin...

item.title: Ron DeSantis Shares Tesla Cybercab Spotting In Miami, Says It'll Be Interesting To See 'How Locals React'
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) on Tuesday drew attention to a reported Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) Cybercab sighting in Miami, saying he was curious how the autonomous vehicle would perform on city streets and how residents would respond.

item.title: Tesla Sold Only 173 RWD Cybertrucks In Two Years
item.description: One of the great things about automotive recalls is they can give us insights into historical vehicle sales. This is especially the case with Tesla, where we sometimes lack specific sales data we’d like to see. News out this week regarding the company’s Cybertruck reveal a shockingly low figure.

item.title: Cybercab in vegas
item.description: submitted by /u/partyfavor [link] [comments]

item.title: Oklo, Nextpower, Dreamland, SanDisk And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
item.description: Major U.S. indices closed Tuesday on a mixed note, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average gaining 0.11% to 49,760.55. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 slipped 0.16% to 7,400.96 and the Nasdaq dropped 0.71% to 26,088.20.

item.title: Trump-Xi summit: What's on the table for US, Chinese companies
item.description: President Trump is visiting Beijing this week to meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping, bringing along several Big Tech CEOs like Tesla's (TSLA) Elon Musk and Apple (AAPL) chief executive Tim Cook as part of the US delegation. KraneShares CIO Brendan Ahern comes on Market Domination Overtime to ...

item.title: OpenAI's Altman faces questions about lying, disclosures from Musk's attorney in trial
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman faced questions related to accusations of lying and deciving the company's board as part of Elon Musk's suit againt the him.

item.title: Tesla patent aims to make massive change to common automotive part
item.description: A new Tesla patent aims to fix a common automotive item for a more peaceful ride, revolutionizing its design to remove vibrations and noise during normal operation. Detailed in US 2026/0110320 A1 and published on April 23, the patent re-engineers the humble trim clip—the small plastic fastener th...

item.title: OpenAI's Altman testifies he was 'extremely uncomfortable' with the idea of Musk being named CEO
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman took the stand in Elon Musk's lawsuit against the company on Tuesday.

item.title: Tesla's plans for Robotaxi dominance hit major snag in Austin
item.description: Perhaps Elon Musk's greatest and most valuable attribute as Tesla's CEO is getting investors to stick with him as his company works through the details of his grand declarations. The $40,000 Cybertruck, Tesla Cybercab, and Roadster all represent promises made, and broken, by Musk in recent years,...

item.title: Tesla’s AI Chip Pivot Reshapes Valuation Story For NasdaqGS TSLA
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has outlined a Terafab semiconductor facility in Texas focused on AI and autonomy chips. The company is working with SpaceX and Intel on advanced chip production to support self-driving and AI workloads. Tesla is raising capital expenditure on AI compute and humanoid robotic...

item.title: U.S. CEOs seek China business gains from Trump-Xi summit
item.description: STORY: It’s a who’s who of the business world heading to China with U.S. President Donald Trump this week as he meets with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Elon Musk, Apple’s Tim Cook and others will make the trip, according to a White House official.

item.title: SpaceX and Google mull massive partnership on Musk’s orbital data dream: report
item.description: SpaceX and Google are in the process of ironing out the details of a potential partnership, a new report from the Wall Street Journal says. The two companies are currently in talks for a rocket launch deal to support the placement of data centers in orbit as part of their push into space-based co...

item.title: Piper Sandler delivers blunt message for Tesla stock investors
item.description: Tesla rally alert: analyst sees massive upside from Optimus and AI beyond core EV value

item.title: How Big Do Elon Musk Backers Think SpaceX Can Be? This One Says $10 Trillion—Or More
item.description: Baron Capital's Ron Baron thinks Elon Musk's SpaceX could eventually be "the largest company on the planet" with a market capitalization of $30 trillion.

item.title: Tesla: Another Chance To Sell (Technical Analysis)
Tesla's Battery Supplier Sees a 19% Demand Rebound
item.description: Panasonic forecasts 46 gigawatt hours of US battery demand

item.title: Tesla moves Basic Autopilot features to paid FSD where available
item.description: Tesla has quietly removed Basic Autopilot from its online configurator in the Netherlands. New orders now only offer Full Self-Driving (Supervised) — no free driver-assistance tier at all. The change makes the Netherlands the first European market where Tesla has stripped Basic Autopilot from the...

item.title: Tesla Sinks 5% as Musk Heads to China: Robotaxi Glitches, Battery Delays Test Investor Patience
item.description: Shares of Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) are down roughly 5% intraday on Tuesday, trading near $423 and change after closing at $445 on Monday. The pullback arrives just as Tesla CEO Elon Musk prepares to join a business delegation to China, where Tesla’s pending Full Self-Driving (FSD) approval remains a m...

item.title: Issues with Tesla’s Robotaxi “Rollout” in Texas
item.description: Reuters has an article out titled “Tesla’s robotaxi rollout features Texas-sized wait times.” Youch — stinger. Of course, as I’ve reminded readers in the past, less than a year ago, Tesla CEO Elon Musk predicted that Tesla robotaxis would probably be covering half of the US population by the end ...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Shrugs Off High Gas Prices: 'I'll Pay $15 a Gallon — I Drive a Tesla'
item.description: Nothing reveals the gap between Hollywood and everyday America quite like a celebrity joking about $15 gasoline while driving a car that does not even use gasoline. As gas prices surged following Russia's invasion of Ukraine, Stephen Colbert, the host...

item.title: Elon Musk To Join Trump On China State Visit. Tesla Stock Sinks.
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk will be among a group of business leaders joining President Donald Trump's state visit to China.

item.title: Legendary investor Ron Baron says Tesla and SpaceX stock buys will continue
item.description: Legendary investor Ron Baron says he will continue buying stock of both Tesla and SpaceX, as he continues his support behind CEO Elon Musk, who he says is a special person and “brilliant.” In a wide-ranging appearance on CNBC’s Squawk Box on May 12, legendary investor Ron Baron, founder, CEO, and...

item.title: Spotted on the streets of Houston...
item.description: Tesla Cybercab spotted in the wild... submitted by /u/MikeBoudet [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla finally launches Supercharger virtual queue pilot after fights broke out
item.description: Tesla is now testing a virtual waitlist feature at five Supercharger locations, allowing drivers to join a queue through the Tesla app instead of physically lining up at crowded stations. The pilot comes over a year after Tesla promised the feature following a viral video of a fight between Tesla...

item.title: Tesla stock slips ahead of Musk's trip to China with Trump trade delegation
item.description: After a string of gains, Tesla stock slipped on Tuesday ahead of CEO Elon Musk's trip to China with President Trump.

item.title: Waymo recalls 3,791 robotaxis over flooded road incident, deploying OTA software fix
item.description: Waymo has filed a voluntary recall with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) covering 3,791 robotaxis after one of its vehicles drove into a flooded road in San Antonio last month. No one was injured. The key detail: the recall is a software fix that will be deployed over th...
